top_signals.title: Ex-Fed advisor gets over three years in prison for lying about China ties
top_signals.summary: The case marks one of the most prominent U.S. prosecutions alleging Chinese intelligence targeting of U.S. institutions, as Trump intensifies its pursuit of foreign economic espionage.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: SK Hynix shares plunge 11% as Asia sees tech rout, tracking U.S. chip losses
top_signals.summary: Asian semiconductor stocks tumbled on Thursday as a selloff in U.S. chipmakers spilled into the region.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
